name: Circle K (Belvedere/North Augusta Travel Center)
description: A 24-hour Circle K truck stop just off I-20 Exit 5 near the Georgia line with diesel lanes, a CAT scale, a shower, and a deli.

name: S & S Truck Stop - North Augusta
description: A long-running independent truck stop near I-20 Exit 5 in North Augusta offering diesel, a deli/store, showers and repair service.

name: Circle K #5377 (Aiken)
description: A 24-hour Circle K fuel and truck stop at I-20 Exit 22 in Aiken with diesel lanes and limited truck parking but no showers.

name: Love's Travel Stop #424
description: A full-service Love's Travel Stop at I-20 Exit 51 in Lexington with truck parking, showers, CAT scale, McDonald's and Chester's Chicken.

name: Love's Truck Care & Speedco - Lexington
description: On-site truck service bays at the Lexington Love's (I-20 Exit 51) providing tire service, light mechanical work and emergency roadside assistance.

name: Flying J Travel Center #712
description: A large Flying J travel center at I-20 Exit 70 in Columbia with many truck parking spaces, showers, a CAT scale and a Denny's restaurant.

name: TA Columbia North
description: A TravelCenters of America location at I-20 Exit 71 in Columbia with truck parking, showers, laundry, a CAT scale and a full TA truck service shop.
